title: Israel Keeps Up Strikes in Lebanon as Hezbollah Signals Defiance
summary_full: There were few signs that either side was prepared to step back from the fighting. Israel said it struck an area south of Beirut and issued new evacuation warnings.
summary_public: There were few signs that either side was prepared to step back from the fighting. Israel said it struck an area south of Beirut and issued new evacuation warnings.

IL.label: neutral
IL.evidence: Israel said it struck an area south of Beirut
